ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hits" (
  "hit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each HIT */,
  "hit_type_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the type of HIT */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the HIT */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task to be performed */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the HIT */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward offered for completing the HIT */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time when the HIT was created */,
  "max_assignments" INTEGER /* Maximum number of assignments for the HIT */,
  "requester_annotation" TEXT /* Additional annotations or comments by the requester */,
  "assignment_duration_in_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration in seconds for which the assignment is valid */,
  "auto_approval_delay_in_seconds" INTEGER /* Delay in seconds after submission before auto-approval */,
  "expiration" TEXT /* Expiration time for the HIT */,
  "requester_id" TEXT /* ID of the requester who created the HIT */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the HIT (e.g., Active, Expired, Completed) */,
  "review_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the requester to review the submitted annotations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hits_hit_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("hit_type_id") REFERENCES hit_types ("hit_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hits_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES requesters ("requester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hit_types" (
  "hit_type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each HIT type */,
  "hit_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the HIT type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the HIT type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the HIT type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "hit_id" TEXT /* ID of the HIT to which the assignment belongs */,
  "worker_id" TEXT /* ID of the worker who accepted the assignment */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., Submitted, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "accept_time" TEXT /* Time when the worker accepted the assignment */,
  "submit_time" TEXT /* Time when the worker submitted the assignment */,
  "auto_approval_time" TEXT /* Time when the assignment is auto-approved */,
  "work_time_in_seconds" INTEGER /* Time spent by the worker on the assignment in seconds */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the requester on the assignment */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the assignment is rejected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_hit_id FOREIGN KEY ("hit_id") REFERENCES hits ("hit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Name of the worker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the worker */,
  "lifetime_approval_rate" TEXT /* Lifetime approval rate of the worker */,
  "last_30_days_approval_rate" TEXT /* Approval rate of the worker in the last 30 days */,
  "last_7_days_approval_rate" TEXT /* Approval rate of the worker in the last 7 days */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the worker joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last time the worker was active */,
  "total_earnings" TEXT /* Total earnings of the worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "assignment_id" TEXT /* ID of the assignment to which the annotation belongs */,
  "bounding_boxes" TEXT /* Bounding boxes annotated by the worker */,
  "input_image_properties_height" INTEGER /* Height of the input image */,
  "input_image_properties_width" INTEGER /* Width of the input image */,
  "approve" TEXT /* Approval status of the annotation */,
  "reject" TEXT /* Rejection status of the annotation */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score for the annotation */,
  "reviewer_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the reviewer on the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_properties" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "hit_id" TEXT /* ID of the HIT to which the image belongs */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the image (e.g., EXIF data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_properties_hit_id FOREIGN KEY ("hit_id") REFERENCES hits ("hit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requesters" (
  "requester_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each requester */,
  "requester_name" TEXT /* Name of the requester */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the requester */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the requester joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last time the requester was active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "assignment_id" TEXT /* ID of the assignment for which the payment is made */,
  "worker_id" TEXT /* ID of the worker who completed the assignment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid for the completed assignment */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Time when the transaction occurred */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., PayPal, Bank Transfer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Pending, Completed, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_logs" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review log */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation that was reviewed */,
  "requester_id" TEXT /* ID of the requester who performed the review */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Time when the review was performed */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status after the review */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the requester during the review */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_logs_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_logs_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES requesters ("requester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualification_requirements" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualification requirement */,
  "hit_id" TEXT /* ID of the HIT that requires the qualification */,
  "qualification_type" TEXT /* Type of qualification required (e.g., approval rate) */,
  "qualification_value" TEXT /* Value of the qualification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the qualification requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualification_requirements_hit_id FOREIGN KEY ("hit_id") REFERENCES hits ("hit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worker_qualifications" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker qualification */,
  "worker_id" TEXT /* ID of the worker who possesses the qualification */,
  "qualification_type" TEXT /* Type of qualification */,
  "qualification_value" TEXT /* Value of the qualification */,
  "date_achieved" TEXT /* Date when the worker achieved the qualification */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the qualification is still current */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id", "worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hit_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "hit_id" TEXT /* ID of the HIT for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "assignments_completed" INTEGER /* Number of assignments completed for the HIT */,
  "average_work_time_in_seconds" TEXT /* Average work time in seconds for the HIT */,
  "average_confidence_score" TEXT /* Average confidence score of the annotations for the HIT */,
  "average_review_time" TEXT /* Average time taken for reviews of the HIT */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hit_statistics_hit_id FOREIGN KEY ("hit_id") REFERENCES hits ("hit_id")
)
